speaker: MATT
raw_text: Awesome. Speaking of Taliesin and a different Matt, we're both going to be on Eric's TBD RPG tomorrow at noon Pacific time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There are 30 sets left in the store, we will be ordering more. So there will be more, but I don't know when that's, you know, going to come in. So 30 sets for the time being.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fantastic. Thank you Laura. Yes. Taliesin! Wednesday Club coming up, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There is a Wednesday Club. We're doing Comics 101, it's going to be our intro to how to read comics! The notion is like the show that you would show your grandmother, or your friend who's never apparently seen a written word next to a picture before. They do exist! I'm sadly not going to be there, but Amy and Matt are going to throw together something really, really awesome, and I'm going to be helping out from the sidelines, throwing them stuff, because I'm going to be out of town. But yay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yay! We'll have more soon! But we'll both be on Eric's TBD RPG tomorrow at noon, here at Geek and Sundry, Pacific time for the Doctor Who RPG. I'll be returning as my character Meatstick, the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fantastic. Thank you Laura. Yes. Taliesin! Wednesday Club coming up, right?

preceding_turns.text: There is a Wednesday Club. We're doing Comics 101, it's going to be our intro to how to read comics! preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Awesome. Speaking of Taliesin and a different Matt, we're both going to be on Eric's TBD RPG tomorrow at noon Pacific time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good job, guys that got them!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's five attacks in one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if you jump on him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can try, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's not actually a terrible idea. Because at the worst I just fall off one side or the other into the boiling blood-- I'll just stay in the ring of fire. I don't want to test the Sriracha pit just yet. Because he's prone, do I get advantage on the attacks without having to use Reckless?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I make all three of my frenzied attacks?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With advantage. 35 for the first one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ten. 26 again. 26 points of damage. 19. C'mon, 37.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my Action Surge?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Second level in Fighter. Groggy got two more hits.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, good. So, the second arrow does hit. And you're seeing now, Utugash, while looming over and seemingly impervious, at close view, as you get a glance backing up, is looking pretty hurt. Previously, as it's now your second time battling a pit fiend, you're able to see the faint cracks that you're beginning to notice generally show a lot more damage than they do on the surface. So you're starting to see signs of wear, which, based on your previous battle, leads you to believe it's actually pretty hurt. That ends your turn, Vax. And Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope, they are not threatening him currently.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They have to be threatening them to be giving that bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) They are currently under his rump.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The first one is a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The impact from the chest blow ends up, as you go to grab the arrow, you're already kind of a little off-aim from the the wooziness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (grunts in pain) All right. That's fine. I'm going to hit him again, though, or try. That is-- I can add-- 23.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Okay. Yes! 18 plus one lightning damage, plus 2d6, here we go, and two ones! I'm rolling great! Woo!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All of these. All of you guys are goodbyes. And you're a goodbye, too. You can stay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so. How much damage was that, total?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. 19 total. One of those was lightning damage.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ten. So you have ten hit points. And you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand up, and I look at Grog. And in Giant I say, "'Sup."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn, you be talkin' my lingo!

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to spit on him while I'm still standing. And I'm just going to flop on my back, turn back into a dwarf. Be like, "Hey, you guys want to get a beer?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are two imps in the chamber. But they both turn invisible as soon as this happens. And they're attempting to escape as the flame wall disappears, and you see Taryon bleeding out on the ground. Next to his superheated--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I land and Lay on Hands

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yeah, you're close enough to do so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we just toss him in the blood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So how much do you give him?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Because technically they were in melee range with you, since you pushed them out of the way, as they vanish you do get one attack of opportunity across them with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are two imps in the chamber. But they both turn invisible as soon as this happens. And they're attempting to escape as the flame wall disappears, and you see Taryon bleeding out on the ground. Next to his superheated--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I land and Lay on Hands

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yeah, you're close enough to do so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we just toss him in the blood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So how much do you give him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten. So you have ten hit points. And you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! I had the craziest dream.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you all right? Are you really all right? Are you having fun?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Be back after a short break here. They're going to show a few ads and then the Signal Boost episode that Marisha just put out. We'll continue our story here in just a few minutes, guys. See you in a moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is a good plan! Good plan!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's actually working better than I expected.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You glance over your shoulder and watch as a series of devils have now leapt onto Doty and are pulling him apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! This is the part where C-3PO is being pulled apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And that's where we're going to take a break.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Now. Diving back into where we were, folks. You guys are yanked out onto the streets of the Iron City of Dis, pulled off of the roof of Utugash's personal stronghold and yanked across the heated cobblestones, having to keep, through what strength you have, standing, for fear of being dragged across the extremely hot floor. As you are brought through, people begin to gather up on the sides of the street. You begin to see other devils gathering towards the edges, and every ten minutes of walking, when there's a crowd gathered around, some of the devils will go ahead and crack one of you in the back of the knee and give off a showing of ownership and a general sense of cheer emerges with each person that gets smacked in the back of the head or thrust down. Percival, you get, at one point, hit along the side of the jaw and you feel the blood fill the side of your mouth, as you wish you could rub it with your hand, though the way the chains are pulling prevent you from raising your arm too high. You hear the hissing and the occasional rocks being thrown from the distance as you're pulled through. Vex and Vax, go ahead and roll perception checks, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! This is the part where C-3PO is being pulled apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And that's where we're going to take a break.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Be back after a short break here. They're going to show a few ads and then the Signal Boost episode that Marisha just put out. We'll continue our story here in just a few minutes, guys. See you in a moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back. Hopefully the audio's better for some folks. Thank you for being patient. We have a winner in the Wyrmwood contest we had in the chat room. AlchemistKiller wins this awesome set of zebra wood dice box, dice tray, and the dice roller. So congratulations to you, buddy. This'll be coming your way soon, signed by the cast of Critical Role.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: This goes on for about 15 minutes as you guys are pulled through. You watch as nearby Whisperers begin to stop and perch on the edge of buildings to watch. You get the sense that what you guys have done has drawn some attention. As you reach the end of this 15-minute period, you're pulled down a large road and the buildings begin to grow a little thin in this area. You're brought to what looks to be a very, very heavy set of doors, this crimson gate that is humongous: 20 feet by ten feet for each side of the gate, so 40 feet across. It leans at an angle, like a gargantuan cellar door that sits on its own in the center. As you begin to approach, you hear chains suddenly (metal scraping). The doors slowly open with a creaking noise as you're brought towards it. They open, and you can see inside it is lightless, it is dark. The two bone devils tugging further, and with each tug, the chains that connect you all choke and pull you forward. You nearly stumble again as you're brought over the stairway lip and down into this darkened chamber below. You are brought down a seemingly endless set of stairs, the darkness only occasionally broken by the passing faintly red-glowing sconce that passes by as you're brought down. You hear the various mutterings of various Infernal phrases being spoken, chuckled between the devils that speak in your vicinity. You then come to a leveling point. The stairs come to an end, the light opening up in this area; still dim, the reddish glow that occasionally gives you a glimpse of the interior. This, you can only imagine, would be what a prison in hell looks like. The metal and stone walls are warped and misshapen in places; they're almost buckling under the weight of the plane they're holding. You can see what looks to be stone arms that are either carved out of the walls or have been jammed into it as part of the decor. And you see giant metal hooks that occasionally eject out the side, some of them with the remains of some sort of prisoner or meat that has been left to slowly rot. More of those small devilish insects you encountered when you first arrived are gathering and feasting on these remnants. You begin to hear various echoes of screams from some distant place within this labyrinthine series of hallways that have bounced through enough walls to the point that it's this constant ringing gasp, occasionally mixed with this high-pitched whine. This wailing, and this sound of horrible torture. It's very familiar to you, Tova. You have no idea how long you were here before, but it seems endless in hindsight. It could have been days, weeks, months; you don't recall. The air itself is extremely hot, stagnant, and humid with sweat and has that subterranean putrescense to it. The idea that mold and suffering pervade the atmosphere. And, as you're carted through these hallways, you're turned right, left, forward past multiple intersections. More devils pass by. You see another erinyes step by with three other minions to her sides. She hisses as you walk past. You are brought past so many different pathways that it begins to all blend. You're trying to pay attention to remember which way you came, but sometimes the turns almost go so fast, it causes you to lose track of where you originally started. You get the essence that not only this is a massive prison, but it's designed to keep anyone from finding their way back out. You turn one corner as you hear a series of very high-intensity screams that cut through the relative din in the background, and as you turn you see three people: two humans and one male half-elf that are naked and strung up by chains in front of what looks like a large forge. You see there a 12-foot-tall horned devil, his wings folded up over his shoulders, these giant crested horns off the front of his skull. Very Tim Curry Legends-style, who's currently heating this long brand in the forge as he's glaring at them. And as you all walk past, his eyes catch yours and he gives you a nod as he sears it in the body of the half-elf, who begins to quiver and scream against the chains. But he just gives you the rest of the head nod as you pass, cross the door, not seeing them any further.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Vex, as this is happening and you watch Percival recoil from the impact, you glance with a bit of a sneer towards the crowd and you watch amongst all these various toothy, hissing devils, you see one familiar red-skinned man with long-ish dark hair, horns curled up, and as his eyes meet yours, he gives you a smile. And steps back with the crowd as it closes around him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bits of filth are being chucked. Grog, one-- not quite sure what form of refuse this is, but it smears and drips down the side of your face, and gets stuck in your beard. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. You catch it in your mouth. And it is filthy. You don't even know what it is. You regret the impulse immediately.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 17. The chain on one of your ankles begins to bend. It's not quite-- doesn't fully break. But you can see that it's getting some headway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket goes over to the edge of the bars and leans into them and is marking a claw across the ground and it's about a good foot away from the equipment and you can see that smoke begin to rise

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Dead for a ducat, it's dead! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see that the fur is beginning to send off smoke smoke and burn against the bars as he's leaning against them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, back away. Maybe you can try and just break through these manacles. Can you do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Reaches up and grabs the one around your ankle and tugs, and you see it begin to singe the outside of his tongue. And he's pulling. Make a strength check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so you go over and grab a spare from her pouch. You guys begin-- we'll say over the next five minutes or so-- getting everyone undone at this point. You pull-- you have the chains still dangling from your wrists, the manacles still attached to your Titanstone Gauntlets, but you're free.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just fucking let me out of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, thanks. He gives me a spare and I start trying to work on the door while he's doing the others.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're not quite certain, but it's pushing close to an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, as long as we don't get caught.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't mind starting out that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I think getting-- yeah, we should, it's easier to not get caught. And then we'll stealth as bats.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. So we're starting as bats. Bats?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do our bats sound like?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. This is concentration, so this will get rid of your Shapechange.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Correct. So as long as we're cool with me losing my ninth-level Shapechange. I can't escort us as an erinyes anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we should just walk, but if you want to do this, you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we'll just-- there's a lot of demons around here. Devils.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much longer is my Shapechange left? It lasts for an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't speak that shit, is the problem.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Percival. You just plummeted to the ground. Actually, both you and Vax from the fall, since you were 15 feet up, you both took two points of bludgeoning damage, and five points of bludgeoning damage, Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a concentration of up to 24 hours, so as long as I don't use a concentration--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: On a subsequent turn, I can use my action to transform affected creatures into new forms.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So. Now in these forms, if it looks like it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do, but you attack as a bat.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And a hit is one point of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what was your initiative order? What was your number?

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: We're stuck as bats until she lets us out?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As long as you just stay out of the way and don't break your concentration, you can keep turning us in and out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So that's probably exactly what I'm going to do, is to try and not get hit, by the by.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ending their turn now. The bone devil is going to catch up, flies in, its wings expanding forward, it's going to go ahead and make three attacks against you, Vax, since you're the closest one to it. That is ten, 20, and 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Unless my bat stats are-- bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bat AC is 12, so you're actually like (whoosh), you dodge out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And that is a seven, and a 21. 21 hit you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No. Nope. Oh, it just hits me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It just? That's what I thought. So you take five points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you take two points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The other one is going to attack you again twice as well. That's a four and an 11. Nope.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You didn't realize until the last moment and was like, "Oh, if Keyleth goes down."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right. So we have the extreme hint.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But we were bats, Matt. That was pretty fine planning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was awesome. It was going great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to heal yourself? Potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pop Trinket out, as my bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say, just instinctually, you pop him out about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And that was my full movement and everything, wasn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. All right, Vax, it's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I run and skip right up next to my sister and I have a potion of superior healing and I pour it into Keyleth's mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay. Vax! I'm at 49 hit points.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been roughly an hour. A little over an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was awesome. It was going great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to heal yourself? Potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pop Trinket out, as my bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say, just instinctually, you pop him out about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. All right, Vax, it's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I run and skip right up next to my sister and I have a potion of superior healing and I pour it into Keyleth's mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay. Vax! I'm at 49 hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You didn't realize until the last moment and was like, "Oh, if Keyleth goes down."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long has it been since the pit fiend moment?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, because you haven't had a short rest, so you don't have your blood curses back, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm done. Reload, and that's the end of my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. At this point, you guys can hear distant yelling getting louder and louder down the hallway where you came from. You hear the voices echoing and swarming, and people are starting to get closer, knowing where you are. Tova, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: How many of these devil-guys are left?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's just the one bone devil left.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to run back a full 45 feet. How close can I get to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 45? You can get about there. You're about ten, 15 feet from him. Ten feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do you have anything to heal with? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You hungry? Yeah. You have any food? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, it's Vax, the half-elf rogue guy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, as a note, just remember this, it took you a while to get there because the chains that were rolling around it are entangling and wrapping around the area, so you were at half movement, which got you just to there. I forgot to mention that earlier. However, the chains, in the process, are crushing and doing damage as you move through them. Six points of bludgeoning damage to you as you pull your way through the chains getting to that area. All right, that ends Tova's turn. It is now the chain golem's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything on the door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You knock the dust from the side, and as you inspect closely, hearing the chains grinding and spinning around you, and occasionally you duck because you see one kind of whip across and break part of the stone and cause chunks of it to fly off. You look down, and you see two small eyes and one deep, toothy grin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But is it a fanged grin? A fanged grin is usually cocked. But it looks more--

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't appear sincere, so. What do I have left?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And bear form. (sings) And bear form. There is your bear form. All righty. So ending Tova's turn, it is now the golem's turn. The golem has a ten-foot range on its slam. It's going to do two slam attacks. It's going to reach out and slam once at Percy, who is within its front range there after landing, and Keyleth, who's immediately to its left.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't appear sincere, so. What do I have left?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, as a note, just remember this, it took you a while to get there because the chains that were rolling around it are entangling and wrapping around the area, so you were at half movement, which got you just to there. I forgot to mention that earlier. However, the chains, in the process, are crushing and doing damage as you move through them. Six points of bludgeoning damage to you as you pull your way through the chains getting to that area. All right, that ends Tova's turn. It is now the chain golem's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Do I have an extra action or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your action was to do the investigation. You have your bonus, if you have something to spend it with.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's happened before. Our story ended up keeping Rothfuss here for three or four weeks in a row. It was supposed to be just a one-night thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Five minutes later, Tova was killed. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are devils that can see through invisibility.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure it will be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure you'll be fine. It'll be great.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Worst case scenario, she ends the day where she started.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was a really fun episode. That was a really fun game.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like that was the most fun that we've had in a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was fun. Guys, well done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Noelle, thank you so much for playing with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Such a blast. Good sticking to the guns and staying behind. I was like, I don't know what she's going to do about this. Thinking you were going to find a way to find them.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and then I just keep showing up every week. You can't get rid of me. (laughter)
